title: chelonopsis moschata var. longipes
intro: Chelonopsis moschata var. longipes, also known as Chinese bugleweed or Longipes bugleweed, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chelonopsis moschata var. longipes include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to administer its medicinal properties.
